title: MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following services: -Enforces dog licensing and control ordinances -Promotes the humane treatment of dogs -Provides shelter and care for stray dogs until they are reunited with their families or adopted -Dog adoption and fostering 3550 Aumsville Highway SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Dog Services: Monday-Friday noon-6pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Enforcement and Complaints: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Adoption: Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-6pm, Saturday 11am-3pm Email (503) 588-5233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 588-5233 Alternate (503) 566-6988 Enforcement and Complaints Alternate (503) 566-6966 Dog Licensing Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Walk in for adoption viewing. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Relevant documentation of dog, if available AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots bus service has multiple routes to the agency. Services: Animal Adoption Animal Control Animal Licenses Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES
